samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder with pipelined stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation.</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal indicating the availability of the result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="IDLE" value="2'b00"/>
        <state name="STAGE1" value="2'b01"/>
        <state name="STAGE2" value="2'b10"/>
        <state name="DONE" value="2'b11"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="reg_i_en" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="i_en" next_state="STAGE1"/>
        <register id="reg_adda" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE1"/>
        <register id="reg_addb" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE1"/>
        <register id="reg_sum_stage1" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE2"/>
        <register id="reg_carry_stage1" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE2"/>
        <register id="reg_sum_stage2" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_carry_stage1" next_state="DONE"/>
        <register id="reg_result" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_sum_stage2" next_state="IDLE"/>
        <register id="reg_o_en" init_value="0" control_signal="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_sum_stage2" next_state="IDLE"/>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Pipeline Stage 1
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                reg_sum_stage1 <= 0;
                reg_carry_stage1 <= 0;
            end else if (reg_i_en) begin
                {reg_carry_stage1, reg_sum_stage1} <= reg_adda + reg_addb;
            end
        end
        
        // Pipeline Stage 2
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                reg_sum_stage2 <= 0;
            end else if (reg_carry_stage1) begin
                reg_sum_stage2 <= reg_sum_stage1;
            end
        end
        
        // Final Result
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                reg_result <= 0;
                reg_o_en <= 0;
            end else if (reg_sum_stage2) begin
                reg_result <= reg_sum_stage2;
                reg_o_en <= 1;
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
```
